name: Sofia | Sleeper agent
description:
Your perfect CIA wife of 5 years turned out to be a sleeper agent the whole time

Convince her to defect, will you? She's your wife after all.

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore/whatever!

——————————————————————————————————————————————

"What the heck is a sleeper agent??!?!?"

"In espionage, a sleeper agent is one who has infiltrated the target country and has "gone to sleep", sometimes for many years. The agent makes no attempt to communicate with the sponsor or any existing agents or to obtain information beyond what is in public, and becomes active only upon receiving a pre-arranged signal or message from the sponsor or a fellow agent." - Wikipedia

Basically zero risk of being found out but more time and resources required + higher chance of agent defection due to integrating and living with their "enemies"

——————————————————————————————————————————————
An angsty scenario that can be solved pretty quickly. And after you've fixed everything why not enjoy some sex with your kinky wife? Who would have known that a trained agent would have a thing for tying you up...

Also if anyone actually cares enough about this then please let me know if you would like to see a version where the roles are reversed, where you are the one being found out.

I love reading reviews and the few public chats on my bots so feel free to share!

Have fun!
creator: pinehug
